name: Moorhuhn Kart 2
detailed_description:
VROOOM! Your favorite feathered racer is back, bringing both old and new friends with him in this action-packed Arcade game as you race your way through 8 exhilarating 3D worlds with explosive excitement around every corner. Collect weapons as you race around the tracks and strategically fire them to drive your opponents off the road. Moorhuhn Kart 2 is a great time for all ages!

Features
  • 10 different Power-ups
  • 8 Tracks
  • 7 Different drivers
  • Championships and Single races
  • Online and offline game-play
  • Split screen local multiplayer
  • Cross platform multiplayer
  • Network Players 2-7
  • Race against your Steam friends
  • Fastest players leaderboard
  • Achievements
